FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Interface ISceneBackend

Namespace
FluentGpu.Scene
Assembly
FluentGpu.Scene.dll

The reconciler's only window onto the retained tree — handle-in / handle-out, POD-only. (The slice implements this directly on SceneStore.)

public interface ISceneBackend

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
